description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front of the house includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, as well as a small landscaped section with trees and shrubs. The rear and side views reveal additional outdoor spaces, including a paved area and more greenery. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal or wood accents. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. Features include a front patio, outdoor furniture, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio with umbrella, outdoor seating, and a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain light-colored wall, rear patio area, and two trees on either side.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows, a small porch, and visible landscaping including a tree and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark facade, rear patio with umbrella, and a tree in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small porch, and adjacent patio area with outdoor furniture and umbrella.
